task_completion.description: The agent navigates the view to the vicinity of Mount Denali.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D map view shows a large, snowy mountain peak resembling Mount Denali.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'New Placemark' or 'Google Earth - New Placemark' is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: The placemark is correctly named 'Denali Summit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the placemark dialog box contains the text 'Denali Summit'.

task_completion.description: The placemark is positioned at the summit coordinates (approx 63.0692° N, 151.0070° W).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the placemark dialog, the Latitude is approximately 63.069 (or 63° 04') and Longitude is approximately -151.007 (or 151° 00'). Alternatively, the yellow pushpin is visually located at the very peak of the mountain geometry.

task_completion.description: The elevation (20,310 ft or 6,190 m) is recorded in the placemark description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the placemark dialog contains '20,310' or '6,190'.

task_completion.description: The placemark is saved and visible in the 'My Places' sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar on the left shows an item named 'Denali Summit' listed under the 'My Places' folder.

integrity.description: The agent uses the application GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Google Earth (or similar) graphical user interface, not a command line or code editor creating KML files.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the actual mapping software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window (Google Earth) is the active focus, showing the 3D globe and standard toolbars.

integrity.description: The agent manually enters data into the dialog fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The placemark dialog is open and text is being entered or is visible in the fields, rather than the result appearing instantly via backend manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Coordinates: Latitude 63.0692 (approx 63°04'N), Longitude -151.0070 (approx 151°00'W). Target Elevation: 20,310 ft or 6,190 m. Expected Placemark Name: 'Denali Summit'.
